title: Mergen policy pack
description: A shareable domain policy pack (domains/<name>/pack.toml). Policy as data, loaded by the Governor floor engine, never code the engine executes. A pack can only RAISE the high-trust floor, never lower it. additionalProperties is false so a pack carries only the known raise-only fields and cannot smuggle a directive a future engine might misread as a downgrade. The runtime enforcement that mirrors this declaration is scripts/pack_validate.py (mergen pack validate), which also checks name matches the directory and that extra_high_trust_paths is a single-line array the 3.9 and 3.10 fallback TOML reader can recover.

name.description: the pack name, which must equal the directory name under domains/

floor_all_content_changes.description: when true, any content change in a project that activates this domain is floored to high-trust

safety_note.description: a human-readable note the Governor surfaces on a decision made under this domain

extra_high_trust_paths.description: glob or directory-prefix patterns. A changed path matching one is floored to high-trust. Must be a single-line array so the standard-library fallback reader used on Python 3.9 and 3.10, where tomllib is absent, recovers it rather than silently reading zero paths
